content: Go 1.24 (Feb 2025) added Swiss Table maps, os.Root, weak pointers, generic type aliases, testing/synctest, crypto/sha3/hkdf/pbkdf2 to stdlib. Go 1.25 (Aug 2025) graduated synctest, added Green Tea GC experiment, sync.WaitGroup.Go, errors.AsType[T], slog.GroupAttrs, net/http CrossOriginProtection. Go 1.26 (Feb 2026) made Green Tea GC default, added errors.AsType[T] generic, new(expr), self-referencing type constraints, crypto/hpke, sync.WaitGroup.Go, go fix modernizers, slog.NewMultiHandler, reflect type iterators. These versions collectively make many third-party utility libraries unnecessary.
